title: ProjectRed - Thaumcraft
description: Giving Project Red Pipes a Thaumcraft 4 feel
body:
This resource pack transforms Project Red Mechanical Module (pipes, items, GUI and their respective names) into Thaumcraft 4 style.

Chips become Essence Crystals with a visual reference to aspects that make sense for their function and pipes look more ragged.

It enables the fantasy feel of having a magic Matter Energy system.
Made for use in the Lost Era Modpack.
